mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reviews ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (author, password, content, rating, is_best, is_visible) VALUES (#{author}, #{password}, #{content}, #{rating}, #{isBest}, #{isVisible})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id}
